creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg&sektion=8 for FreeBSD 10.2 the only documented use of -f is as a flag for the bootstrap command. 

Please add to the man page other known uses of 

-f

I'm aware of at least the following: 

pkg update -f

pkg upgrade -f

----

A question about upgrade -f was asked in irc://chat.freenode.net/#pcbsd a couple of days ago.

Other discussions that question or exemplify uses of -f include https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/pkg-broken-after-upgrading-from-9-3-to-10-1.51659/#post-289663 and https://forums.pcbsd.org/thread-19980.html
